name: Google Nest Cam
short_description: A line of indoor and outdoor home security cameras with on-device and cloud AI for motion, person, and familiar-face detection.
long_description: The Nest Cam is a fixed home camera, first launched in 2015 as a rebrand of the acquired Dropcam, that streams 1080p (later 2K HDR) video and runs computer-vision AI to distinguish people, animals, vehicles, and packages from ordinary motion. Its Familiar Faces feature, now powered by Gemini for Home, builds a library of recognized people so the camera can tell a homeowner who is at the door rather than simply that something moved. As an always-on sensing node embedded in the home's infrastructure, it shows how physical AI in daily life often appears not as a robot or wearable but as an ambient appliance that watches, classifies, and notifies, which is also what drives its surveillance and privacy debates.

images.caption: Design of the Google Nest Cam Indoor.
images.alt_text: A white and black Google Nest Cam Indoor security camera on a magnetic stand.

sources.title: Nest Indoor & Outdoor Smart Security Cameras
sources.access_notes: Official Google Store product category page for Nest Cams.

sources.title: Google Nest
sources.access_notes: History: Dropcam acquired June 2014; Nest Cam announced and launched June 2015; renamed Nest Cam Indoor after Nest Cam Outdoor (July 2016).

sources.title: Gemini for Home camera updates improve Familiar Face, animal detection, more
sources.access_notes: Documents the Gemini-powered Familiar Faces and detection AI on current Nest Cams.

interactions.title: It tells you who's at the door, by name
interactions.description: Instead of a generic 'someone is at the front door,' the camera matches the face against your saved library and pings you that it's your sister on the porch, not a stranger.
interactions.source_label: Google Nest Help — familiar face detection

interactions.title: A package alert that watches the package
interactions.description: When a delivery lands inside your porch activity zone, the camera tracks the courier and the box and sends a 'package delivered' notification rather than just flagging motion.

interactions.title: Notifications that read like a sentence
interactions.description: With Gemini for Home, the alert says 'the dog is digging in the garden' instead of 'animal detected,' and an evening Home Brief summarizes the whole day's clips into one digest.
interactions.source_label: Google Nest Help — Gemini for Home camera features

interactions.title: Talking your dog off the couch from work
interactions.description: Owners use two-way talk to scold or reassure a pet remotely, and set an activity zone around the trash bin so the camera pings them if the dog lingers there while they're out.
interactions.source_label: Google — Nest Cam tips for pup parents

interactions.title: Recruited as a makeshift baby monitor
interactions.description: Parents repurpose the camera to peek at the crib from their phone, checking whether the baby is truly awake or just stirring before walking in and disrupting the nap.
interactions.source_label: Android Central — Nest Cam as a baby monitor

interactions.title: Ask it what happened to the vase
interactions.description: Using Gemini's natural-language history search, you type 'what happened to the vase in the living room?' or 'when did the dog walker come by?' and get the matching clip back instead of scrubbing hours of footage.
interactions.source_label: Google Nest Help — Ask Home video search

interactions.title: A quiet word when only the cat should be home
interactions.description: Pair familiar-face recognition with the daytime hours nobody's expected back, so an unrecognized person in the living room triggers a tighter alert than the usual cat-on-the-sofa motion — built on the face matching and activity zones the camera already runs.
